harness.js:10:4-24:7
> exec(((("pdflatex -output-directory " + dest_file) + " ") + src_file), (err, stdout, stderr) => { if (err) { callback(1, `pdflatex[1] error: ${err}`); } else { exec(((("pdflatex -output-directory " + dest_file) + " ") + src_file), (err, stdout, stderr) => { if (err) { callback(1, `pdflatex[2] error: ${err}`); } else { callback(0, `[node-latex-complete] Complete source: ${src_file}, check out result in ${dest_file}!`); } }); } });
